independence: independent: implemented from SPEC only; did NOT read spl_model_numpy.py / track-1 code

inputs.SPLo_caveat: [L2-condition-undetermined]: absolute-level conditions (distance/voltage/baffle/smoothing) not stated; carried through
inputs.Re_unit_grade: [L1 instrument] LEAP Revc; unit-level; DC 7.4 teardown cross-check; not used in main/secondary caliber

outputs.system_sens_1W_total_grade: [L2 model] @1m far-field-extrapolated, on-axis, free-field, coherent; SPLo abs-level [L2-cond-undetermined]

caveats.far_field: @1m = far-field extrapolated (825mm aperture; @1m not far-field for HF) - honest convention
caveats.SPLo_ref_band: SPLo=82.161 is reference single-value; ref band not annotated in KB; NOT per-frequency over 500Hz-6k
caveats.series_no_double_count: series +6dB on-axis NOT added to array gain (already in +10log10(16)); series only changes impedance accounting

out_of_scope: max SPL / enclosure / room / off-axis / per-frequency - NOT computed (Line-3 / R3)
no_external_caliber: no externally-quotable sensitivity until CTO rules; no doc 88->82 change
